title: pseudostellaria heterantha
intro: Pseudostellaria heterantha, also known as the Tibetan snow lotus, is a perennial herb that belongs to the primulaceae family, native to the alpine meadows of the Tibetan Plateau. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immune-boosting effects. The health benefits of pseudostellaria heterantha include reducing fever, relieving cough and asthma symptoms, and promoting wound healing. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
